title: 10 best herbal tinctures for neuritis
description: Frankincense tinctures helps with neuritis because of its potent anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The bioactive compounds in frankincense, such as boswellic acids, work to reduce swelling and pain in the nerves, providing relief from symptoms like numbness, tingling, and burning sensations.
